item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.92,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第一版删掉非必填项，完成率从42%到51%；第二版合并地址栏，完成率到59%；第三版拆开错误提示，完成率到64%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天想压掉一个字段，把目标推到68%，请给改法"}],"abstain_reason":"legal convergence exclusion: direct iteration on the form/object with measurable completion-rate gains and mixed mechanisms, without same-class recurrence"}
